summary: PR-06 (Presentation Recovery arc, code lane) rebuilds the Character HUD panel on runtime children inside the existing native ornate chrome, with no baked summary and no duplicated rendering. hud.gd _build_character_panel holds a persistent _character_body that _refresh_character_panel clears (_clear_children) and repopulates on every open with: a composed figure drawn through the SAME PlayerVisual render path as the world and the creation preview (_make_character_figure -> apply_preview_character on a dict assembled from live player state incl. equipped_dict(), so the figure shows the live worn gear and cannot drift); live identity (name/species/body/look/appearance/role/traits); live status (health/attunement/attack/carried); and all 13 equipment slots (_equipment_board_slots) with empty slots as an em dash. The old _character_info baked label is removed; character_figure_snapshot() exposes the figure snapshot for the smoke. Presentation only. Waited-GUI smoke 343/343; validator + capsule_doctor public_repo + wiki links green; HUD-QA 08_character_panel (1280x720) + 09_character_panel_wide (1600x900) reviewed.
scope: PR-06 code lane only: hud.gd Character panel rebuild + figure via shared path + 13-slot list + character_figure_snapshot; pr06 smoke; hud_visual_qa captures; validator hook; HANDOFF/matrix/queue/VARIABLE_MATRIX(.md+two-row .html sync)/contract docs. No image production, no chrome replacement, no gameplay/save change. Broad wiki regen deliberately excluded.
